home.heroLead: Enterprises and training organizations face the same challenges: complexity, inefficiency, lost time. Mentivis designs and deploys concrete solutions, end to end.

entryEnterprise.title: Turn training into a performance lever
items: Maturity audit
Internal academy creation
Training policy & structure

entryOf.title: Structure, secure and grow your activity
items: Pedagogy & compliance
Strategy & positioning
Outsourced services

home.diffLead: Four structural principles — not a marketing pitch.

differentiation.title: Training & education specialists
differentiation.body: We are not consulting generalists. All of our expertise is concentrated on a single field: training and skills development.

differentiation.title: Full-stack approach
differentiation.body: From strategy to operational execution. We don't deliver recommendations without implementing them.

differentiation.title: Compensation tied to your results
differentiation.body: A variable share linked to measured performance. We perform when you perform — that's what structurally distinguishes us from a consulting firm.

differentiation.title: Real intervention on the ground
differentiation.body: No deliverables without follow-through. Our work is measured by actual deployment, not by slide decks.

home.promiseBody: Our model is based on variable compensation aligned with results. We have no interest in delivering a recommendation you can't apply.
home.promiseSig: — That's what structurally sets us apart from a consulting firm.
home.proofNote: Representative indicators — every mission is calibrated and measured against its own KPIs.
home.finalCtaLead: First conversation is free, no commitment. We listen, then tell you honestly whether we're the right fit.

title: A specialized operator.
Not a consulting firm.
about.lead: Mentivis designs, structures and deploys training programs. Our compensation is aligned with the results we deliver.
mission: Specialized operator in training and skills development
End-to-end intervention: strategy, design, deployment, steering
Compensation aligned with results — not deliverables
about.expertiseLead: Four pillars covering the full training spectrum, from strategy to operational execution.

expertise.title: Strategy
expertise.body: Positioning, maturity audit, program development, go-to-market.

expertise.title: End-to-end creation
expertise.body: Legal, pedagogical and operational structuring of any training entity.

expertise.title: Solution development
expertise.body: Custom tools, AI solutions, dedicated platforms.

about.whyLead: Not a service catalogue — a results promise.

why.title: 360° view
why.body: We understand your ecosystem as a whole before acting.

why.title: Advice AND execution
why.body: We don't deliver recommendations without implementing them.

why.title: Effective actions
why.body: Rigorous prioritization, controlled timelines, real operational execution.

why.title: KPI-driven steering
why.body: Every mission is measured. Our compensation depends on it.

about.costLead: A transparent pricing approach designed to remove the client's risk and align both parties' interests.

cost.title: Results-aligned fees
cost.body: A variable share tied to measured performance.

cost.title: Targeted & efficient
cost.body: We intervene where impact is maximal — not everywhere at once.

cost.title: Documented ROI
cost.body: Every mission produces tangible performance KPIs.

cost.title: Offers tailored to you
cost.body: Small, mid-size or large company — we calibrate the intervention.

of.heroLead: Creation, compliance, growth — Mentivis supports training organizations at every stage, from initial structuring to performance steering.
of.pillarsLead: A clearer, more actionable services architecture.

pillars.title: Strategy
pillars.body: Position your TO on the market, structure its growth and secure its financing.
items: Positioning audit and competitive analysis
Program development and new offer launches
Financing engineering (CPF, OPCO, Region, FSE)
Go-to-market and commercial strategy
Marketing and communication of the training offer

pillars.title: Operations
pillars.body: Take over key functions to free your pedagogical teams and accelerate growth.
items: Acquisition: lead generation, conversion funnels, prescribers
Apprenticeship: administrative management, employer relations, OPCO
Communication: brand positioning, content, digital visibility
Instructional content: e-learning modules, materials, assessments

pillars.title: Administrative
pillars.body: Secure regulatory compliance and lighten the administrative load.
items: Activity declaration and initial compliance setup
Qualiopi preparation and follow-up: mock audit, action plan, audit presence
Pedagogical and Financial Report (BPF): collection, entry, filing
Learner files management and continuous compliance

pillars.title: End-to-end creation
pillars.body: Design and launch a complete training entity, turnkey, from zero.
items: Pedagogical project and economic model definition
Legal and administrative structuring (declaration, certifications)
Operational processes and management tools setup
Initial commercial deployment and activity launch

of.externalisedLead: Take over key functions to free the pedagogical team. This offer is distinct from advisory and structuring: Mentivis runs it, the TO focuses on its core business.
of.paymentBody: Variable compensation aligned with the results obtained. Guaranteed alignment of interests: we perform when you perform. That's what structurally differentiates this model from a classic engagement.
results: Structured pedagogical offer, credible on the market
Robust organization, less dependent on improvisation
of.finalCta: An organization to structure, secure or grow?

enterprise.heroLead: Internal academies, skills development, program structuring — Mentivis designs and deploys training solutions that are truly operational.
problems: Loosely structured programs, disconnected from business stakes
No steering of skills or results
Dependency on multiple vendors, no global view
enterprise.pillarsLead: A clear offer aligned with what business directors actually need.

pillars.title: Strategy
pillars.body: Build the training vision and the foundations to steer skills development long term.
items: HR audit and training diagnosis: status, gaps, priorities
Feasibility studies: target model, resources, financial viability
Financing engineering (OPCO, skills development plan)
Definition of skills paths and career tracks

pillars.title: Operations
pillars.body: Move from strategy to execution: we design and deploy the concrete programs.
items: Training creation: instructional design, content, assessments
Operational rollout: facilitation, team support, tooling
Declarations and regulatory compliance (Qualiopi if applicable, BPF)
Support for HR teams and managers in adoption

pillars.title: Administrative
pillars.body: Handle administrative and regulatory complexity so your teams can focus on results.
items: Training files management and OPCO relations
Regulatory compliance and legal obligations follow-up
Budget steering and training reporting

pillars.title: Entity creation
pillars.body: Build your internal or external training entity from scratch — TO, CFA, specialized school.
items: Internal TO: structure an academy or corporate school
External TO: create an independent training organization
CFA: file preparation, accreditation, apprenticeship rollout
Specialized school: positioning, certification, commercial launch

results: Programs that are actually used, measurable and lasting
Training aligned with business stakes and HR objectives
Reduced wasteful spend, better use of financing
why: Training and education specialists, not generalists
We deploy — we don't just deliver recommendations
Our compensation is aligned with your results
End-to-end or stage-by-stage, depending on your needs
enterprise.finalCta: A training project to structure or transform?

solutions.heroLead: Beyond human support, Mentivis develops custom technology solutions to durably equip your training practices.

pillars.title: Custom tool design
pillars.body: No generic tools — everything is built for your operational reality.
items: Needs analysis and functional specification
UX design and user journey prototyping
Steering tools, dashboards, reporting systems

pillars.title: Specific tool development
pillars.body: From prototype to production. Robust solutions, integrated with your existing ecosystem.
items: LMS platforms or pedagogical management tools
Integration with your HR systems (SIRH, ATS, business tools)
Interactive e-learning modules and custom digital paths

pillars.title: AI tools
pillars.body: AI applied to training: recommendation, automation, predictive analysis.
items: Personalized content and path recommendation engines
Automation of administrative processes
Predictive skills analysis and needs detection
Chatbots and intelligent pedagogical assistants
